title: SUMNACON Crystal Jewelry Box Trinket Organizer, Rectangle Silver Trinket Storage Box with Lid, Decorative Jewelry Trinket Box Holder for Earrings Ring Necklace
features: Workmanship: Rectangle jewelry box is made of sturdy metal frame and surrounded by artificial K9 crystal, which shows elegant and exquisite style. Metal frame goes with electroplated and polished, which is not easy to fade, sturdy for long time using.
Size: Package includes 1 pack trinket box. Overall dimension (Length x Width x Height) of storage box is 15 x 9.8 x 7.8cm/ 5.9 x 3.9 x 3 inch, perfect size to store small trinket.

Multipurpose: Suitable for storing and display your beloved earrings, ring, necklace, bracelet and other small trinkets, or pearl, watch and precious collections. This jewelry organizer is lightweight and portable, convenient to carry when go out.

Wonderful Design: The decorative earring box comes with a bead in the front of the lid for easy opening. And there are 4 metal beads on the bottom to reduce the friction between the box and the desktop.
Exquisite Gift: It is a good choice to choose this elegant jewelry box as a gift for Birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Christmas. It can also be used as a wedding ring collection box for wife.
description: Product Description Crystal jewelry box makes your life easier and keeps your desk tidy. Keeping your trinkets stay in one box, and saving time that no need to find everywhere. The bottom of the inside jewelry box is a mirror, increasing the visual of the storage space, and the crystals sparkle in the light, making it even more striking. Modern style crystal jewelry box will match with kinds of furniture at home, as an exquisite decoration on the dresser, tabletop, desk of the bedroom, living room. Specification : Color: Gold，Silver Material: Metal + Glass Net weight: 600g Packing size: 14*10*9cm Packing included: 1 Pack Crystal Jewelry Box (Jewelry Not Included) Note : 1. Due to manual measurement, please allow a difference of 1-3 cm. 2. Due to the difference between light and screen, the actual color may be slightly different from the pictures.
